case_title: THE STUDENT LOAN CORPORATION VS. ANDREW A MENNINGER et al

docket_entries.description: MINI-MINUTES FOR JUL-13-2011 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 610

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-23-2012 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 2:00 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE NOV-23-2011 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JAN-23-2012 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
